channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mike Ditka's family provides health update after hospice rumors
item.description: Mike Ditka and his wife have moved back to Chicago after a brief stint in Florida — and no, the Hall of Famer is not in hospice despite rumors.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league’s leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks’ NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team before or during baseball's winter meetings
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball's winter meetings in Dallas, which run from Dec. 8-12.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oklahoma's throwback offensive approach against Alabama gets LSU's attention
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Oklahoma appears to have borrowed from the past to cure its recent offensive ills. The Sooners, best known this century for a passing prowess that has produced four Heisman Trophy-winning quarterbacks, took it back to the 20th century against then-No. 7 Alabama.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: North Carolina football coach Mack Brown won't return for 2025 season
item.description: Mack Brown sounded firm in his intent to return for another season as North Carolina's coach. A day later, the school announced it was time for a change instead.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women volleyball players feeling 'unsafe' over trans player lose appeal of Biden judge's 'shameful' ruling
item.description: An appeal to a federal judge's ruling that will let a trans athlete compete at the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament was denied amid safety concerns.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lia Thomas reacts to San Jose State women's volleyball transgender controversy
item.description: Former UPenn swimmer Lia Thomas spoke about the controversy surrounding San Jose State women's volleyball and transgender player Blaire Fleming.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA says Hawks violated player participation policy by sitting Trae Young for Cup game
item.description: The NBA fined the Atlanta Hawks $100,000 on Tuesday after an investigation determined that guard Trae Young could have played in an NBA Cup game against the Boston Celtics on Nov. 12. The Hawks listed Young on their injury report that night as out because of tendinitis in his right Achilles.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Lionel Messi has his new coach: Javier Mascherano's hiring by Inter Miami is now complete
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Lionel Messi and Javier Mascherano are together again, this time with Inter Miami. The former Barcelona and Argentina teammates have reunited, with Inter Miami announcing Tuesday that Mascherano's hiring as the club's new coach is complete.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Joel Dahmen's biggest win was keeping his PGA Tour card: Analysis
item.description: ST. SIMONS ISLAND, Ga. (AP) — Getting a PGA Tour card is difficult enough. Joel Dahmen can attest to that. He was a natural talent whose life got turned upside down when his mother died of cancer his junior year of high school.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ruling in doping case set to give biathlon star Fourcade a gold 15 years after Vancouver Olympics
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Almost 15 years after the Vancouver Olympics, a ruling by sport's highest court in a Russian doping case is set to give French biathlon star Martin Fourcade another gold medal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Analysis: The Spurs and Magic have fought through adversity. Other teams are searching for answers
item.description: Adversity finds every team in the NBA at some point. Somebody is going to get injured or sick, guaranteed. How those stretches are handled can make or break a season. Orlando and San Antonio are finding a way right now. New Orleans and Philadelphia are among the teams that aren't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fourth-down decision late in second quarter allows John Harbaugh to remain unbeaten vs. his brother
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Coaches normally don't go for it on fourth-and-1 on their own 16-yard line when they're trailing 10-7 with 2 minutes to go in the first half.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson accounts for 3 TDs, John Harbaugh moves to 3-0 vs. brother as Ravens beat Chargers 30-23
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Lamar Jackson and Derrick Henry made sure Ravens coach John Harbaugh could maintain bragging rights over his younger brother.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NHL player Paul Bissonnette attacked during altercation at Scottsdale steakhouse
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Former NHL player and TNT hockey analyst Paul Bissonnette was assaulted by several men during an altercation at a Scottsdale steakhouse on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn loses its cool, then loses a game. And Dan Hurley had some thoughts afterward
item.description: LAHAINA, Hawaii (AP) — Dan Hurley fell. So did UConn. Hurley, the often-fiery coach of the two-time defending national champions, was livid over an over-the-back call in the final minute of overtime in what became No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Column: As offense ascends, Bears defense goes on sneaky decline under Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears' defense has been struggling to stop opposing offenses, resulting in a five-game losing streak, while the offense has been unable to score enough points to win games.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 20 years later: A look back at the Malice at the Palace
item.description: (WXIN/WTTV) — It has now been 20 whole years since the most infamous night in Indiana Pacers franchise history: The Malice at the Palace. One of the worst brawls in U.S. sports history, the incident occurred on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, NewsNation
